code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut total = 0
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i <= n
  mut is_sep = false
  if i == n
    is_sep = true
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10 or b < 0
      is_sep = true
    end
  end

  if is_sep
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let v = match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v > 0
        total = total + v
      else if v < 0
        total = total - v
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

print("r=#{total}")
